category_sources: Official cgit description says Microsoft Publisher file format parser library.
source_facts.description: Interpret and import Microsoft Publisher content
display_name_sources: Official Document Foundation wiki URL and freedesktop cgit repository are named libmspub.
docs_sources: The official wiki page was access-protected during review, but the Homebrew source_facts.homepage points to it as the upstream documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage provides the official Document Foundation DLP library page for libmspub.
repo_sources: Official freedesktop cgit page https://cgit.freedesktop.org/libreoffice/libmspub/ lists clone URL https://anongit.freedesktop.org/git/libreoffice/libmspub.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Microsoft Publisher content import/interpretation.
source_facts.executables lists pub2raw and pub2xhtml conversion tools.
